description_long: A stack of four golden-brown pancakes sits neatly on a large, faceted blue plate. The pancakes are thick and fluffy, with slightly uneven edges that give them a homemade appearance. On top of the stack, there are two rectangular pats of yellow butter, partially melting and glistening. Syrup has been generously poured over the pancakes, creating glossy trails and small pools on the plate. The blue plate is wide and flat, providing ample space for the syrup to spread. The overall presentation is appetizing and visually appealing, with the contrast between the warm tones of the pancakes and the cool blue of the plate.
description: A stack of four golden-brown pancakes with melting butter and syrup sits on a large blue plate. The presentation is inviting, with syrup pooling around the pancakes.
description_view_0: The front view shows the full stack of pancakes with butter and syrup clearly visible on top, and syrup trails spreading across the blue plate.
description_view_1: This view highlights the thickness of the pancakes and the melting butter, with syrup pooling more prominently on the right side of the plate.
description_view_2: From this angle, the butter pats are still visible, and the syrup appears to have spread further across the plate, emphasizing the stack's height.
description_view_3: This view shows the butter and syrup from a slightly different angle, with syrup trails extending toward the front edge of the plate.
